Let's Talk
TR EN
SYSTEM ASSESSMENT

SAP System Check-Up

Assess, optimize, and align your SAP landscape with best practices.

SAP Best Practice Alignment

Digital transformation is no longer optional — it is a key driver of long-term competitiveness. Organizations must continuously refine their systems to stay aligned with evolving technologies and industry standards.

The SAP Check-Up service provides a comprehensive assessment of your current landscape, identifying how well your system aligns with SAP Best Practices. It highlights inefficiencies, risks, and opportunities for improvement.

Measure System Health, Improve Performance

Over time, changing business requirements, regulatory updates, and custom developments can increase system complexity.

trending_down

Reduced performance

hourglass_top

Inefficient processes

payments

Increased costs

With a structured Check-Up approach, your system is evaluated objectively to create a more efficient, scalable, and maintainable architecture.

In-Depth Analysis & Actionable Roadmap

architecture

SAP Architecture & Technical Assessment

checklist

Process Evaluation Across Modules

sync_alt

Integration & Data Flow Analysis

code

Custom Development Review

gavel

Compliance & Regulatory Checks

Based on these insights, a clear and prioritized action plan is delivered.

Continuous Alignment, Maximum Value

The Check-Up is not just a snapshot — it is a foundation for continuous improvement.

update

Stay Current

Keep your systems up to date

bolt

Quick Adaptation

Adapt quickly to new business needs

tune

trending_up
